Gift Card Offer Predictions

Every gift card offer that Woolworths and Coles will run in 2026 based on historical data. These predictions can serve as a rough guide but they shouldn’t be relied upon.

This page was last updated 10 Jul 2026 12:13am.

Predicted Promotion
Start
End
Ref
